# HeapSort

## Core
- 因为Priority Queue可以做到，当你insert(x), then deleteMax()可以吧当前最大的那一个拿出来
- ==we don't leave index 0 blank==

## In-place algorithm
1. Each array naturally can form a heap formation according to heap representation and shape property
2. Build-heap O(N): Find the last non-leaf node: index $\le$ [N/2] and sink
	Time is not O(NlogN) because not every node need sink and each node will have limited floors to sink, so its linear
3. Find the max and switch with A[last index], redo sink

## Runtime
- insert: O(N)
- deleteMax: O(logN)
- Total: O(N logN)
